title: HUMMBL Slack Command Receipt
description: Receipt for a Slack-originated mobile command — read-only, draft, write-pending-approval, destructive, or forbidden. Draft status, not canon until namespace review.

workspace_id_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of workspace ID (never raw workspace ID).

channel_id_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of channel ID (never raw channel ID).

thread_ts.description: Slack thread timestamp, or null if not in a thread.

actor_id_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of actor ID (never raw actor ID).

received_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when command was received.

command_text_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of command text (never raw command text in receipt).

parsed_intent.description: Parsed intent classification (e.g., status_check, draft_issue, create_pr, raw_shell).

requested_repo.description: Repository targeted by command, or null if not repo-specific.

requested_tool.description: Tool requested for execution, or null if not tool-specific.

authority.description: Authority level of actor (e.g., operator, steward, viewer).

executor.description: Executor that handled the command, or null if denied before execution.

approval_ref.description: Reference to approval record, or null if not required or denied.

output_policy.description: Output policy applied to Slack response.

slack_response_ts.description: Slack response message timestamp, or null if not posted.

redactions_applied.description: List of redaction types applied (e.g., api_key, hostname, channel_name).
